info.name: Ecom Microservices API
info.description: All discoverable HTTP endpoints across the four implemented services (API Gateway, Auth Service, Product Service, Inventory Service), read directly from each service's FastAPI routers. Auth/Inventory/Product folders hit each backend service directly (each enforces its own JWT auth via a `Depends(get_current_user)`-style dependency, independent of the gateway). The API Gateway folder documents the gateway's own health/ready/metrics endpoints plus a few representative requests through its single dynamic reverse-proxy route (`/api/v1/{path}`), which forwards to whichever backend `route_table.py` maps the path prefix to. Set `{{access_token}}` (an access token from Auth Service > Sign In) before running any request whose folder/item includes a Bearer auth block. NOTE: the gateway's static route table maps the whole `/admin` prefix to product-service only, so inventory's `/admin/inventory/*` endpoints are not reachable through the gateway today (`api_gateway/route_table.py`) -- call them directly against `inventory_base_url` instead, as this collection does.

variable.description: API Gateway root (docker-compose maps 8080:8080). Proxied paths live under /api/v1/*.
JWT access token returned by Auth Service > Sign In / Sign Up flows.
Refresh token returned alongside the access token by TokenPair responses.

item.name: API Gateway
item.description: services/api_gateway/src/api_gateway/main.py. The only functional route is a catch-all reverse proxy at `/api/v1/{path}` (methods GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE, `include_in_schema=False`), which authenticates the bearer token (if present), enforces the per-prefix RBAC policy from `route_table.py`, rate limits, and forwards untouched to the upstream service. `/internal/*` paths are always blocked (404) at the gateway. `/healthz`, `/readyz`, `/metrics` are mounted directly on the gateway app (not under /api/v1) via the shared `ecom_common.bootstrap.create_app`/`ecom_common.health.build_ops_router`.

item.name: [Proxy] Sign In (-> Auth Service)
item.description: route_table.py: prefix /auth, policy {'*': PUBLIC}. Forwarded as-is to auth-service's POST /auth/signin.

item.name: [Proxy] List Products (-> Product Service)
item.description: route_table.py: prefix /products, policy {'GET': PUBLIC, '*': {SELLER, ADMIN}}. GET is public through the gateway.

item.name: [Proxy] Create Product (-> Product Service, requires SELLER/ADMIN)
item.description: route_table.py: prefix /products, non-GET methods require role SELLER or ADMIN (checked against the JWT by the gateway before forwarding; the product-service itself re-checks via its own require_seller dependency).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Ant Esports GW180 Corsa Gaming Racing Wheel",
  "retail_price": 89.99,
  "discount": 10.00,
  "category": "Gaming",
  "sub_category": "Accessories",
  "brand": "Ant Esports",
  "description": "Force-feedback racing wheel with pedals."
}

item.name: [Proxy] Get Inventory by Product (-> Inventory Service)
item.description: route_table.py: prefix /inventory, policy {'GET': PUBLIC, '*': {SELLER, ADMIN}}.

item.name: [Proxy] Reserve Stock (-> Inventory Service, requires SELLER/ADMIN)
item.description: route_table.py: prefix /inventory, non-GET methods require role SELLER or ADMIN.

item.name: Auth Service
item.description: services/auth_service/src/auth_service/api/routes.py (router prefix /auth, tags=[auth]) plus internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False, not gateway-routable). Called directly against {{auth_base_url}}; no /api/v1 prefix at the service level (that only exists at the gateway).

item.name: Sign Up
item.description: POST /auth/signup. Body: UserSignup {username, email?, password, role?} (role defaults to CUSTOMER; privileged roles require an ADMIN caller, enforced in service). No auth required.

item.name: Sign In
item.description: POST /auth/signin. OAuth2 password grant form (OAuth2PasswordRequestForm): username, password. No auth required. Returns TokenPair (access_token, refresh_token, token_type, expires_in, role).

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: POST /auth/token/refresh. Body: RefreshRequest {refresh_token}. No auth header required (the refresh token itself is the credential). Reuse of a rotated-away token kills the whole session.

item.name: Logout
item.description: POST /auth/logout. Auth: Depends(get_current_token) -> Bearer access token required. Denylists the current token's jti.

item.name: Logout All Sessions
item.description: POST /auth/logout/all. Auth: Depends(get_current_token) -> Bearer access token required. Revokes all active sessions for the calling user.

item.name: SSO Google Login (ID token)
item.description: POST /auth/sso/google. Body: GoogleLoginRequest {token} (Google ID token obtained by the frontend). No auth header required.

item.name: SSO Generic Login
item.description: POST /auth/sso/login. Body: SSOLoginRequest {provider, subject, email?, display_name?}. No auth header required. Generic upsert for pre-verified identities.

item.name: SSO Google Authorize (browser redirect)
item.description: GET /auth/sso/google/authorize. No auth required. Returns a 307 redirect to Google's consent screen; intended for a browser, not a plain API call.

item.name: SSO Google Callback
item.description: GET /auth/sso/google/callback?code=&state=. Query params: code (str), state (str). No auth header required; Google redirects here after consent.

item.name: Validate Token
item.description: GET /auth/validate. Auth: Depends(get_current_token) -> Bearer access token required. Returns the caller's UserResponse.

item.name: Get Current User
item.description: GET /auth/users/me. Auth: Depends(get_current_token) -> Bearer access token required.

item.name: Admin Diagnostics
item.description: GET /auth/admin/diagnostics. Auth: Depends(require_roles(get_current_token, Role.ADMIN)) -> Bearer access token required, caller role must be ADMIN.

item.name: [Internal] Get User by ID
item.description: GET /internal/users/{user_id}. internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False) -- service-to-service only (used by the order saga's validate_user activity); not routable through the gateway, which 404s any /internal/* path. No auth dependency is declared on this handler itself (only DbDep, AuthServiceDep) -- trust boundary is network-level (call from another service), not a bearer token.

item.name: Inventory Service
item.description: services/inventory_service/src/inventory_service/api/routes.py: router (prefix /inventory, tags=[inventory]), admin_router (prefix /admin/inventory, tags=[admin]), internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False, not gateway-routable). Called directly against {{inventory_base_url}}. require_seller = require_roles(get_current_user, Role.SELLER) (SELLER or ADMIN); require_admin = require_roles(get_current_user, Role.ADMIN) (ADMIN only).

item.name: List Low Stock Products
item.description: GET /inventory/reports/low-stock. Query: page (int, default 1), page_size (int, default 20, max 100). Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN).

item.name: List Out of Stock Products
item.description: GET /inventory/reports/out-of-stock. Query: page, page_size. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN).

item.name: List Inventory
item.description: GET /inventory. Query: page, page_size, status (alias, one of IN_STOCK/LOW_STOCK/OUT_OF_STOCK), warehouse_location (exact match). No auth dependency declared on this handler.

item.name: Get Inventory by Product
item.description: GET /inventory/{product_id}. Path param: product_id (int). No auth dependency declared on this handler.

item.name: Create Inventory
item.description: POST /inventory. Body: InventoryCreate {product_id, sku, warehouse_location, available_quantity, safety_stock, reorder_threshold}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN).

item.name: Update Inventory Metadata
item.description: PUT /inventory/{product_id}. Body: InventoryUpdate {sku?, warehouse_location?, safety_stock?, reorder_threshold?, version} (metadata only -- quantities are mutated exclusively via reserve/release/restock/adjust). Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN). Optimistic-locked via version (409 on mismatch).

item.name: Reserve Stock
item.description: POST /inventory/{product_id}/reserve. Body: ReserveStockRequest {order_id, quantity}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN). Manual/ops override -- primary automatic path is the OrderCreated Kafka consumer. Idempotent per order_id.

item.name: Release Reserved Stock
item.description: POST /inventory/{product_id}/release. Body: ReleaseStockRequest {order_id}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN). Idempotent no-op if already released.

item.name: Adjust Stock (manual correction)
item.description: POST /inventory/{product_id}/adjust. Body: AdjustStockRequest {delta (signed int), reason}. Auth: require_admin (ADMIN only). Not for order flows -- stocktake/damage corrections.

item.name: Restock Product
item.description: POST /inventory/{product_id}/restock. Body: RestockRequest {quantity (> 0)}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN).

item.name: Bulk Update Inventory (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/inventory/bulk-update. Body: BulkInventoryUpdate {items: [{product_id, safety_stock?, reorder_threshold?, warehouse_location?}]} (min 1 item). Auth: require_admin (ADMIN only). Each item is committed individually so one bad item doesn't roll back the batch.

item.name: Inventory Health Report (Admin)
item.description: GET /admin/inventory/health-report. Auth: require_admin (ADMIN only). Aggregate counts across the whole catalog; cached for a short TTL.

item.name: [Internal] Get Inventory by Product
item.description: GET /internal/inventory/{product_id}. internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False) -- service-to-service stock lookup (future Order Service checkout-time check); not routable through the gateway. No auth dependency declared (only DbDep).

item.name: Product Service
item.description: services/product_service/src/product_service/api/routes.py: router (prefix /products, tags=[products]), admin_router (prefix /admin/products, tags=[admin]), internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False, not gateway-routable). Called directly against {{product_base_url}}. require_seller = require_roles(get_current_user, Role.SELLER) (SELLER or ADMIN); require_admin = require_roles(get_current_user, Role.ADMIN) (ADMIN only). Public GET catalog endpoints only ever return PUBLISHED, non-deleted products.

item.name: List Products
item.description: GET /products. Query: page, page_size, category, sub_category, brand, brand_id, category_id, min_price, max_price, sort (one of id, price, -price, rating, name, newest). No auth.

item.name: List Brands
item.description: GET /products/brands. No auth. Active brands only.

item.name: Get Brand by ID
item.description: GET /products/brands/{brand_id}. No auth.

item.name: List Manufacturers
item.description: GET /products/manufacturers. No auth.

item.name: Get Manufacturer by ID
item.description: GET /products/manufacturers/{manufacturer_id}. No auth.

item.name: List Categories
item.description: GET /products/categories?parent_id=. Query: parent_id (int, omit for top-level categories). No auth.

item.name: Get Category by ID
item.description: GET /products/categories/{category_id}. No auth.

item.name: Get Category Subtree
item.description: GET /products/categories/{category_id}/subtree. No auth. Returns the category and all its descendants.

item.name: List Tags
item.description: GET /products/tags. No auth.

item.name: List Collections
item.description: GET /products/collections. No auth. Active collections only.

item.name: Get Collection by ID
item.description: GET /products/collections/{collection_id}. No auth.

item.name: List Collection Products
item.description: GET /products/collections/{collection_id}/products. Query: page, page_size. No auth. Only PUBLISHED, non-deleted products.

item.name: List Product Attributes
item.description: GET /products/attributes. No auth.

item.name: List Attribute Values
item.description: GET /products/attributes/{attribute_id}/values. No auth.

item.name: Get Product by ID
item.description: GET /products/{product_id}. No auth. Public read path -- 404s unless the product is PUBLISHED and not soft-deleted.

item.name: Create Product
item.description: POST /products. Body: ProductCreate {title, slug?, uniq_id?, product_url?, retail_price?, discount?, image_urls?, description?, category?, sub_category?, brand?, brand_id?, manufacturer_id?, category_id?, seo_title?, seo_description?, canonical_url?, meta_keywords?, attributes?}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER or ADMIN). Creates a product owned by the calling seller.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Ant Esports GW180 Corsa Gaming Racing Wheel",
  "retail_price": 89.99,
  "discount": 10.00,
  "description": "Force-feedback racing wheel with pedals.",
  "category": "Gaming",
  "sub_category": "Accessories",
  "brand": "Ant Esports",
  "brand_id": 7,
  "manufacturer_id": 3,
  "category_id": 12,
  "seo_title": "Ant Esports GW180 Corsa Racing Wheel | Buy Online",
  "seo_description": "Force-feedback racing wheel with pedals, best price guaranteed.",
  "meta_keywords": ["racing wheel", "gaming accessories"],
  "attributes": { "connector": "USB-A" }
}

item.name: Update Product
item.description: PUT /products/{product_id}. Body: ProductUpdate (all fields optional, same shape as ProductCreate minus uniq_id). Auth: require_seller (SELLER can only modify own products; ADMIN can modify any).

item.name: Delete Product
item.description: DELETE /products/{product_id}. Auth: require_seller (SELLER can only delete own products; ADMIN can delete any). Soft-delete: row is kept, is_deleted=true.

item.name: List Product Variants
item.description: GET /products/{product_id}/variants. No auth.

item.name: Get Product Variant
item.description: GET /products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}. No auth.

item.name: Create Product Variant
item.description: POST /products/{product_id}/variants. Body: ProductVariantCreate {variant_name, barcode?, upc?, ean?, hsn_code?, gst_category?, country_of_origin?, weight_grams?, length_mm?, width_mm?, height_mm?, fragile?, shipping_class?, manufacturer_warranty_months?, serial_number_required?, expiry_tracked?, attributes?, is_default?, status? (ACTIVE default), attribute_value_ids?}. Auth: require_seller (owning seller or ADMIN).

item.name: Update Product Variant
item.description: PUT /products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}. Body: ProductVariantUpdate (all fields optional, same shape as ProductVariantCreate minus attribute_value_ids). Auth: require_seller (owning seller or ADMIN).

item.name: Delete Product Variant
item.description: DELETE /products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}. Auth: require_seller (owning seller or ADMIN).

item.name: List Product Images
item.description: GET /products/{product_id}/images. No auth.

item.name: Create Product Image
item.description: POST /products/{product_id}/images. Body: ProductImageCreate {variant_id?, kind? (GALLERY default), url, video_url?, alt_text?, sort_order?}. Auth: require_seller (owning seller or ADMIN). Only one PRIMARY image allowed per product/variant.

item.name: Delete Product Image
item.description: DELETE /products/{product_id}/images/{image_id}. Auth: require_seller (owning seller or ADMIN).

item.name: Seed Products from CSV (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/seed. No body. dependencies=[Depends(require_admin)] -- ADMIN only. Reads settings.seed_csv_path server-side; returns a 'seeding disabled' message if not configured.

item.name: Create Brand (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/brands. Body: BrandCreate {name, slug, logo_url?, manufacturer_id?, description?, is_active? (true default)}. ADMIN only.

item.name: Update Brand (Admin)
item.description: PUT /admin/products/brands/{brand_id}. Body: BrandUpdate (all fields optional, same shape as BrandCreate). ADMIN only.

item.name: Delete Brand (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/brands/{brand_id}. ADMIN only. 409 if still referenced by products.

item.name: Create Manufacturer (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/manufacturers. Body: ManufacturerCreate {name, country_of_origin? (2-letter), contact_info?}. ADMIN only.

item.name: Update Manufacturer (Admin)
item.description: PUT /admin/products/manufacturers/{manufacturer_id}. Body: ManufacturerUpdate (all fields optional). ADMIN only.

item.name: Delete Manufacturer (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/manufacturers/{manufacturer_id}. ADMIN only. 409 if referenced by brands or products.

item.name: Create Category (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/categories. Body: CategoryCreate {name, parent_id?, sort_order? (0 default)}. ADMIN only. Server computes slug/path/depth.

item.name: Update Category (Admin)
item.description: PUT /admin/products/categories/{category_id}. Body: CategoryUpdate {is_active?, sort_order?} -- deliberately minimal; renaming/re-parenting is out of scope. ADMIN only.

item.name: Delete Category (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/categories/{category_id}. ADMIN only. 409 if it has child categories or referencing products.

item.name: Create Tag (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/tags. Body: TagCreate {name, slug}. ADMIN only.

item.name: Delete Tag (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/tags/{tag_id}. ADMIN only. 409 if still applied to products.

item.name: Create Collection (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/collections. Body: CollectionCreate {name, slug, description?, is_active? (true default), starts_at?, ends_at?}. ADMIN only.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Gaming Sale",
  "slug": "summer-gaming-sale",
  "description": "Seasonal gaming gear promotion",
  "is_active": true,
  "starts_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "ends_at": "2026-08-31T23:59:59Z"
}

item.name: Update Collection (Admin)
item.description: PUT /admin/products/collections/{collection_id}. Body: CollectionUpdate (all fields optional). ADMIN only.

item.name: Delete Collection (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/collections/{collection_id}. ADMIN only. 409 if it still has products linked.

item.name: Add Product to Collection (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/collections/{collection_id}/products/{product_id}. No body. ADMIN only. 409 if already in the collection.

item.name: Remove Product from Collection (Admin)
item.description: DELETE /admin/products/collections/{collection_id}/products/{product_id}. No body. ADMIN only.

item.name: Create Product Attribute (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/attributes. Body: ProductAttributeCreate {name, code, is_variant_defining? (false default), sort_order? (0 default)}. ADMIN only.

item.name: Create Attribute Value (Admin)
item.description: POST /admin/products/attributes/{attribute_id}/values. Body: AttributeValueCreate {value, slug? (server-generated from value if omitted), sort_order? (0 default)}. ADMIN only.

item.name: [Internal] Get Product by ID
item.description: GET /internal/products/{product_id}. internal_router (prefix /internal, include_in_schema=False) -- service-to-service lookup (cart price snapshots, search backfill); not routable through the gateway. No auth dependency declared (only DbDep). Unlike the public endpoint, this can see non-PUBLISHED products (not soft-deleted).

item.name: [Internal] List Products
item.description: GET /internal/products. Query: page, page_size. internal_router -- paged catalog dump for the search-service backfill; sees every non-deleted product regardless of lifecycle status. No auth dependency declared.
